questions.question: Describe how customer data is encrypted both at rest in your databases and in transit across public networks.
What is the frequency of your automated vulnerability scans, and how often do you undergo external third-party penetration testing?
How do you enforce access control and the principle of least privilege, and is Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) required for all employee access?
Do you hold active SOC 2 Type II or ISO/IEC 27001 compliance certifications? Please provide the date of your latest audit.
Describe your incident response plan and specify your Service Level Agreement (SLA) for notifying customers in the event of a security breach.
What are your Recovery Time Objective (RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO) targets for backups and disaster recovery?
Provide your detailed migration roadmap and timeline for transitioning all cryptographic systems to NIST-approved post-quantum/quantum-resistant algorithms.
